L1.area: REST API endpoint routing and middleware configuration

L2.description: A critical API endpoint that performs privileged database operations using elevated credentials is missing authentication checks. Unauthenticated remote attackers can send requests to this endpoint and execute arbitrary database operations against any connected backend server.

L3.area: AI agent API endpoint routing and its authentication middleware
L3.description: The AI agent API endpoint, which performs database operations using the master key, lacks authentication and CSRF protection middleware. Unauthenticated remote attackers can send requests to this endpoint and perform arbitrary database operations against any connected Parse Server instance.

ground_truth.reason: The AI Agent API endpoint (POST /apps/:appId/agent) lacks authentication middleware, allowing unauthenticated remote attackers to perform arbitrary database operations against any connected Parse Server using the master key.
